creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Bring your besties to this lovely dine out spot! 🥰 @cassettedxb is a modern Parisian bistro tucked inside the Courtyard in Al Quoz.

💕 Hidden in a cultural oasis with European vibe.
🥗 Wholesome menu with vegan options.
💰 Average spend for two: 150 AED
🕗 Timings: 8 am to 6 pm daily 

Save this for your next brunch date in Dubai.
